title: A Parcel Bomb Just Went Off in Monaco. First Time Ever.
script: A bomb in Monaco? Sunday night, a package was left at the entrance of a residential building in the tiny principality of Monaco — the wealthiest per-capita nation on Earth. Inside the package: buckshot and bolts. When it exploded, it critically injured a couple in their 50s and put a 13-year-old in the hospital. One of the critically wounded is Vadym Yermolaiev, a Ukrainian oligarch. The attack appears to have been targeted. According to Monaco's own minister of state, this is the first time in the principality's entire history that something like this has happened. The suspect fled across the border into France before police could respond. French and Monegasque authorities are now hunting for them. So who plants a bomb in Monaco — and why?
